name: powerplatform-open-source-hub-pipeline
description: TypeScript candidate pipeline for generating Power Platform open-source repository data.

scripts.dry-run: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js generate --dry-run --output .\Output\GitHubRepositoriesDetails.json --metrics .\Output\metrics.json
scripts.compare:fixtures: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js compare --baseline .\tests\fixtures\comparison\baseline.json --candidate .\tests\fixtures\comparison\candidate.json --sentinels .\tests\fixtures\comparison\sentinels.json --report .\.test-output\parity-fixture-report.json
scripts.generate:live: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js generate --live --output .\Output\GitHubRepositoriesDetails.json --metrics .\Output\metrics.json
